# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: vpc-network
    type: google_compute_network
    properties:
      auto_create_subnetworks: true

  - name: web-subnet
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      network: vpc-network
      region: us-central1
      enable_private_ip_google_access: false

  - name: app-subnet
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      network: vpc-network
      region: us-central1
      enable_private_ip_google_access: false

  - name: db-subnet
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      network: vpc-network
      region: us-central1
      enable_private_ip_google_access: false
